# Coastal Alpine Tech - Funding System

**Status:** Scaffold live | research snapshot **2026-07-13** 
**Owner:** Coastal Alpine Tech Limited (**pre-seed startup**; HITL required for all applications) 
**Scope:** Maori AI | deeptech | agritech | sovereign / offline edge AI | Te Mana Raraunga

This folder is the org-level home for grant discovery, tracking, and agent-assisted proposal work. It reuses the compliance + CAT skill knowledge base so applications stay aligned with sovereignty and architectural standards.

## Quick start

| Need | Open |
| :--- | :--- |
| How we pursue funding | [FUNDING_GUIDE.md](FUNDING_GUIDE.md) |
| Live opportunity board | [FUNDING_TRACKER.md](FUNDING_TRACKER.md) | [tracker.csv](tracker.csv) |

| **Investor & founder matrix** (what VCs/angels/founders want + Halter/Sharesies/Cursor comps) | [INVESTOR_MATRIX.md](INVESTOR_MATRIX.md) |
| **Roadmap / timeline (todos)** | [ROADMAP_TIMELINE.md](ROADMAP_TIMELINE.md) | [matrices/roadmap_todos.csv](matrices/roadmap_todos.csv) |

| Knowledge base (extracted skills) | [knowledge-base/](knowledge-base/) |
| Fit-score a project | `python scripts/score_fit.py --project "SoilGuard offline edge"` |

## Priority pipeline (as of 2026-07-13)

| Priority | Opportunity | Status | Why CAT |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **P0** | [New to R&D Grant](opportunities/new-to-rd-grant.md) | **OPEN** | Deeptech / edge AI R&D co-fund up to $400k (40%) |
| **P0** | [Maori Development Fund](opportunities/maori-development-fund.md) | **OPEN** (rolling) | Maori economic growth, assets, exports, resilience |
| **P0** | [Primary Sector Growth Fund](opportunities/primary-sector-growth-fund.md) | **OPEN** | Agritech / primary sector co-investment (replaces SFF Futures) |
| **P1** | [R&D Experience Grant](opportunities/rd-experience-grant.md) | Opens **13 Jul 2026** | Student R&D capacity on stack |
| **P1** | [R&D Career Grant](opportunities/rd-career-grant.md) | Opens **31 Aug 2026** | Grad / PhD capacity |
| **P1** | [RDTI](opportunities/rdti.md) | Ongoing | 15% tax credit on eligible R&D |
| **P2** | [NZIAT AI Research Platform](opportunities/nziat-ai-platform.md) | Partner / watch | $70M national AI platform (from Jul 2026) |
| **P2** | [Maori Agribusiness (MABx + whenua funds)](opportunities/maori-agribusiness.md) | Programme / multi-fund | Whenua + cluster agritech pathways |

## HITL & cultural safety

- **No grant application is submitted without human approval** (CAT HITL + cultural review when Maori data, whenua, or iwi partnership claims are involved).
- Agent outputs are **drafts and fit scores only**.
- Align claims with [nz-ai-compliance-soc2](../compliance/nz-ai-compliance-soc2/SKILL.md) and [CAT Architectural Standards](knowledge-base/extracted-skills/cat-architectural-standards.md).
